textPlain: One thing I really miss with flash drives, a write protect switch.Yes, I can mount 'ro', but many (all?) Linux Desktops mount the drive write through its GUI.  I have aliases for mounting and never used the pointy-clicky mount in DEs.FWIW, I am usually in fvwm or cwm, depending on screen size, so I mount 'ro' when I want to.  But a hw switch on flash drives would have been nice :)
